name: Uninsured content creator - still worth suing Perplexity?
description: Yes, they pay; use contingency counsel.[1]

mainEntity.name: Uninsured content creator - still worth suing Perplexity?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, they pay; use contingency counsel.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, Perplexity's VC-backed; targets deep pockets for statutory awards.[1] Key factors: contingency lawyers (33% fee).[1] No personal risk. High settlement potential.
